query: deformable image registration validation brachytherapy cervical cancer guidelines

results.title: Skewfoot.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 19712883. 2009/09/01 00:00. OBJECTIVE: Early correction of congenital scoliosis including short fusion, 
while minimizing both mobility restrictions and growth impairment.
INDICATIONS: Congenital scoliosis with marked deformity, proven progression, 
significant compensatory curves, and/or impairment of trunk balance. 
Furthermore, in case of compression of neural structures or pain due to 
secondary degeneration.
CONTRAINDICATIONS: No absolute contraindication.
SURGICAL TECHNIQUE: Pos
